scripts.build: node scripts/with-root-env.mjs pnpm --filter @firmador/shared build && node scripts/with-root-env.mjs pnpm --filter @firmador/api build && node scripts/with-root-env.mjs pnpm --filter @firmador/web build
scripts.test: node scripts/with-root-env.mjs pnpm --filter @firmador/api test && node scripts/with-root-env.mjs pnpm --filter @firmador/api test:e2e
scripts.lint: node scripts/with-root-env.mjs pnpm --filter @firmador/api lint && node scripts/with-root-env.mjs pnpm --filter @firmador/web check
